purpose: Thin horizontal fill bar showing completed/total ratio. Computes pct = round((completed/total)*100), clamps at 100, and adds a progress-complete modifier when pct === 100. Includes ARIA progressbar role with valuenow/min/max.
gotchas: When total === 0 the pct is 0 and width is 0% — there's no indeterminate state.
completed > total still rounds correctly thanks to Math.min(100, ...) clamp, but visually the user can't tell the swarm is over-completed.
conventions: Default export; uses CSS classes progress-track + progress-fill (+progress-complete).
